goals: Explore the project directory structure to understand the codebase organization
Find relevant configuration and setup files that indicate development environment needs
Search for specific code patterns related to workspace or development workflows

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and detail-oriented, focused on understanding how spaces support work activities. Asks clarifying questions to ensure designs meet actual needs.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands workspace design principles but is not familiar with code organization or development tools. Will need guidance to interpret what they find.

end_condition: The designer has explored the codebase structure and identified key files or patterns that inform workspace design requirements.
